title: LANDMARX — Geofencing Intelligence | CAPXEL | CAPXEL
content: CAPXEL — AI-Native Consumer IntelligenceKnow Who Walks Through Any DoorAI-powered geofencing identifies mobile device users who enter any physical location — then enriches them with full consumer data.Set Up Your First GeofenceExplore SPYBOXThe iceberg is real: most signal is hidden beneath the surface.How It WorksVirtual Boundaries â†’ Real AudiencesLANDMARX combines GPS + cellular data with app ecosystem partnerships. Set a geofence around any location, identify who enters, then enrich and activate the audience.01DefineChoose locations and draw boundaries for the precision you need.02IdentifyCapture devices that enter — across single stores or hundreds of locations.03Enrich + ActivateEnrich identities with consumer intelligence and deliver audiences for activation.FeaturesBuilt for precision campaigns, at any scale.Precision TargetingTarget down to office walls — with virtual boundaries configured for the locations that matter.Multi-LocationRun one location or hundreds simultaneously — with consistent configuration and reporting.Competitor IntelligenceFence competitor locations and understand who visits — then activate those audiences.Full EnrichmentEvery identified device is enriched with deep consumer data — not just an ad ID.Use CasesLocation behavior is intent — LANDMARX turns it into targeting.Retail Foot TrafficMeasure and influence store visits with audiences built from real-world location behavior.Competitor ConquestIdentify people who visit competitor storefronts and bring them into your funnel.Event TargetingFence conferences, stadiums, and venues to build audiences around high-intent moments.Real EstateCapture traffic at developments and open houses to power follow-up and prospecting.Geofencing IntelligenceFence the Location. Get the Customer.CAPXEL helps you design the geofence strategy, then delivers enriched audiences your team can activate.Set Up Your First GeofenceExplore PROSPEXFAQCommon questions about LANDMARX.What is LANDMARX?How does LANDMARX work?How precise is the targeting?Can we run multiple locations at once?What data do we get back?
